entity.label: Archippus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Master of the horse, a “fellow-soldier” of Paul’s (Philemon 1:2), whom he exhorts to renewed activity (Col. 4:17). He was a member of Philemon’s family, probably his son.

nodes.label: Archippus
nodes.description: Master of the horse, a “fellow-soldier” of Paul’s (Philemon 1:2), whom he exhorts to renewed activity (Col. 4:17). He was a member of Philemon’s family, probably his son.

verses.text: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in the Lord, that thou fulfil it.
And to our beloved Apphia, and Archippus our fellowsoldier, and to the church in thy house:
